easy.title: Square Even Numbers
easy.description: Return squares of even numbers from input list using list comprehension.
easy.solution:
def square_evens(nums):
    return [x**2 for x in nums if x % 2 == 0]
hints: Use x**2 for x in nums if x % 2 == 0

medium.title: Vowel Stripper
medium.description: Remove all vowels from string and return list of remaining lowercase characters.

hard.title: Pythagorean Triples Generator
hard.description: Generate list of tuples `(a, b, c)` such that `a^2 + b^2 = c^2` for 1 <= a < b < c <= N.
hard.solution:
def pythagorean_triples(n):
    return [(a, b, c) for a in range(1, n+1) for b in range(a+1, n+1) for c in range(b+1, n+1) if a**2 + b**2 == c**2]
hints: Use 3 nested for clauses in comprehension

debugging.title: Fix SyntaxError in Filter
debugging.buggyCode: res = [x for x in range(10) if x % 2 == 0 else 'odd']
debugging.fixedCode: res = [x if x % 2 == 0 else 'odd' for x in range(10)]
